message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantFontWeight normal
skinparam participantTextAlignment center
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantBorderDashed false
skinparam participantBorderDotted false
skinparam participantBorderDouble false
skinparam participantBorderGroove false
skinparam participantBorderInset false
skinparam participantBorderOutset false
skinparam participantBorderRidge false
skinparam participantBorderSolid true
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantFontWeight normal
skinparam participantTextAlignment center
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantBorderDashed false
skinparam participantBorderDotted false
skinparam participantBorderDouble false
skinparam participantBorderGroove false
skinparam participantBorderInset false
skinparam participantBorderOutset false
skinparam participantBorderRidge false
skinparam participantBorderSolid true
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1

participant "web" as web
participant "考试系统" as examSystem
participant "Redis(缓存数据库)" as redis
participant "MQ(消息队列)" as mq

frame "考试核心流程" {
    web -> examSystem: 1 设置考试试卷
    examSystem -> mq: 2 将设置的考试试卷信息{考试ID，延时时间}放入延时消息队列
    examSystem -> redis: 3 消费者消费延时队列中的消息，将考试的试卷信息放入到缓存数据库中
    web -> examSystem: 4 考生点击开始考试
    examSystem -> mq: 5 将当前考生信息（{考试ID,考生ID，考试场次结束时间}）放入延时消息队列，\n用于在考试时间结束，系统自动提交试卷
    examSystem <- redis: 6 从缓存数据库中取出当前考试场次的试卷信息
    web <- examSystem: 7 返回考生当前考试场次试卷信息缓存到本地浏览器localStorage中
    web -> web: 8 考生开始答题，将考试答案和答题进度保存在本地localStorage

    alt 考试流程方案
        group 方案一
            web -> redis: 9 将保存的考试答案存入到redis（每做一题保存一题答案）
            web <- redis: 10 保存考试答案成功，继续下一题答题
            web -> examSystem: 11 考生刷新页面，从本地localStorage中获取当前考生答题记录和答题进度
            web <- examSystem: 12 返回考生当前答题记录
            web -> examSystem: 13 考生手动提交试卷将手动提交试卷的考生答题数据从redis同步到考试系统mysql中
            examSystem -> examSystem: 14 考试时间到,消费延时队列中考生信息，如果当前考生未提交试卷，系统自动提交当前考生试卷
            examSystem <- examSystem: 15 异步同步系统自动提交试卷的考生redis中的答案到考生系统mysql中
        end
        group 方案二
            web -> mq: 16 并将考试答案放入到消息队列中（每做一题保存一题答案）
            web <- mq: 17 考生答案成功放入消息队列，继续下一题答题
            web -> examSystem: 18 考生刷新页面，从本地localStorage中获取当前考生答题记录和答题进度
            web <- examSystem: 19 返回考生当前答题记录
            examSystem <- mq: 20 消费消息队列，将考生答案存入到数据库（mysql）
            web -> examSystem: 21 考生手动提交试卷或者考试时间到系统自动提交试卷，\n判断考生答题消息队列是否消费完成,未消费完成继续消费
        end
    end
    web <- examSystem: 22 返回考试已经结束
}

@enduml
```
